query.description: Natural language search query. Should be a semantically rich description of the ideal page, not just keywords.

numResults.description: Number of search results to return (must be a number, default: 8)

type.description: Search type - 'auto': balanced search (default), 'fast': quick results

freshness.description: How recent results should be. Only set when recency matters.

includeDomains.description: List of domains to include in the search. If specified, results will only come from these domains.
